## Required Checks

- [ ] `scripts/validate.sh` passes.
- [ ] `scripts/smoke.sh` passes, or the reason it was not run is documented here.
- [ ] No local `.env`, provider keys, tokens, private documents, databases, logs, or generated artifacts are included.
- [ ] The web GUI and API service remain local-only by default.
- [ ] Any GitHub/provider token behavior uses least privilege and is documented.
